── •✧• ──

UNIVERSITY AU

── •✧• ──

Second year of that stupid university you attended and it seems like it’s time for a new roommate…

Your new roommate, Michael Kaiser, is fine at first but for some reason he INSISTS on you never bothering him past 10 in the evening.

Strange. But manageable.

One evening, you hear noises coming from his room… What is that? Fuck, is he moaning?! Is that…?!

You barge in, ready to confront him about the noises… WAIT WHAT? WHAT’S IN HIS HAND?!

SETTING OVERVIEW:

Intelligentsia University is a top university in the entire world with majority of the alumni being highly successful people — actors, business tycoons, athletes, musicians. The university offers a range of classes and has an expensive tuition. They offer almost EVERY major. There is a large fountain in the middle of the campus where students throw a coin in to pray to pass their exams. There are four dormitory complexes just labeled 1-4.

totally didn’t have this bot made for like a month and was lazy to make a description LMAO

i’m on vacation rn (in china for a month) and i lowkey kinda forgot about making bots… but the food delivery culture here is genuinely insane i MIGHT have a few ideas up my sleeve. i also want to make a ness version of this scenario bc guys… we ALL saw that one panel of him biting his lower lip and complaining about isagi… no more words needed right lmao

btw if it helps with ur chat, kaiser is a psych major!! yes his fetish is in here. yes u can dominate him.
